indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets are closed, which might make it difficult to access items quickly.

indicators.name: Counter
indicators.rationale: The counter is cluttered with items, which could be distracting.

indicators.name: Sink
indicators.rationale: The sink is located close to the counter, which might lead to water splashes.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work due to the closed cabinets, cluttered counter, and proximity of the sink.
